# seerr_tautulli_settings (Resource)

Manage Seerr Tautulli settings via /api/v1/settings/tautulli.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The API key for the Tautulli server.
- `external_url` (String) The external URL for the Tautulli server.
- `hostname` (String) The hostname of the Tautulli server.
- `port` (Number) The port of the Tautulli server.
- `url_base` (String) The base URL for the Tautulli server.
- `use_ssl` (Boolean) Whether to use SSL for the connection.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body from the latest operation.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code from the latest operation.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# In Terraform 1.5.0 and later, use an import block to import seerr_tautulli_settings. For example:
#
# import {
#   to = seerr_tautulli_settings.example
#   id = "tautulli"
# }
#
# Otherwise, use the terraform import command:
terraform import seerr_tautulli_settings.example tautulli
```
